title: Add create_schematic operation
description: The kicad-agent has no operation to create a new .kicad_sch file. All 19+ operations require an existing target file. Add a create_schematic op that generates a valid empty KiCad schematic with proper header, UUID, paper size, and title block. Also consider create_pcb and create_project variants. Schema is in src/kicad_agent/ops/schema.py, executor in src/kicad_agent/ops/executor.py.

title: Add create_symbol operation for new component definitions
description: The kicad-agent has no operation to create new component symbols in .kicad_sym library files. AddLibEntryOp only adds library references to sym-lib-table. Need a create_symbol op that defines a symbol with name, pins (number, name, type, position), graphic elements, and properties (reference, value, footprint, datasheet). This is needed to add new ICs like the AK4619VN codec that don't exist in standard or project libraries.

title: Document all operations in prompt.md - 12+ missing
description: prompt.md only documents 19 operations but the schema has 31+. Missing: AddWireOp, AddLabelOp, AddPowerOp, AddJunctionOp, AddNoConnectOp, AddNetClassOp, AssignNetClassOp, AddCopperZoneOp, AddDesignRuleOp, AutoRouteOp, RepairSchematicOp, SetBoardOutlineOp, ValidatePowerNetsOp. These all work in the schema but are not documented for LLM consumption.

title: Add component search and symbol import MCP server
description: kicad-agent needs a way to import component symbols from external sources (SnapMagic, Ultra Librarian, LCSC, Octopart). Currently there's no create_symbol operation and no way to fetch existing symbols from part databases. Build an MCP server that: (1) searches for parts by name/MPN, (2) downloads KiCad symbol + footprint into project library, (3) returns pinout/spec data. This would eliminate the manual symbol creation workaround and speed up schematic design across all 22+ modules. Priority sources: SnapMagic (free KiCad symbols), LCSC (already sourcing from), Octopart (aggregator API).

title: Manually created AK4619VN symbol - workaround for missing create_symbol op
description: Workaround: manually created AK4619VN KiCad symbol in shared library because kicad-agent has no create_symbol operation (kicad-agent-2) and no component import MCP (kicad-agent-4). Also manually created pair-card.kicad_sch because no create_schematic operation (kicad-agent-1). Future: automate via create_symbol op + SnapMagic/LCSC MCP.

title: Add hard pre-PCB schematic quality gate
